tasks.title: cmux.exe CLI + capabilities handshake
tasks.summary: Implement the CLI entrypoint and the capabilities handshake path.
acceptance: manual: verify capabilities response matches protocol version 2

tasks.title: Workspace/panel control commands
tasks.summary: Implement CLI and IPC routing for workspace and panel control commands.
acceptance: manual: verify command routing matches the published command catalog

tasks.title: Crash/log/privacy policy freeze
tasks.summary: Lock crash, logging, and privacy behavior before crash capture integration.
acceptance: manual: verify redaction policy is fixed in _workspace/07-notification.md per .rules/logging-privacy.md
manual: verify analytics opt-in default is false per .rules/logging-privacy.md §analytics-policy
manual: verify log rotation and sink rules are documented per .rules/logging-privacy.md §log-sink

tasks.title: Crash capture integration
tasks.summary: Implement crash capture only after crash and privacy policy is frozen.
acceptance: manual: verify crash capture honors the frozen log/privacy policy from m5-3
manual: verify Crashpad is initialized via InitializeCrashpad() before any other app logic
manual: verify minidump is generated in %LOCALAPPDATA%\cmux\crashes\ on simulated crash
manual: verify crash reporter respects analytics opt-in setting (no upload if opted-out)
notes: Crashpad must be added to vcpkg.json manifest (NOT via ad-hoc 'vcpkg install crashpad'). Add to dependencies array: { "name": "crashpad" }.
Verify microsoft/vcpkg baseline includes crashpad before adding to vcpkg.json.
InitializeCrashpad() minimum signature: bool InitializeCrashpad(const std::filesystem::path& handler_path, const std::filesystem::path& db_path)
crash handler binary (crashpad_handler.exe) must be packaged with app deployment
